headline: Graduate Software Engineer | Application Security & Secure Full-Stack Development
summary: Built and launched Bunkerify, a cybersecurity assessment platform aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight, then extended that product focus into secure full-stack web and mobile engineering. Graduate Software Engineer with a Master of Computer Science (Cybersecurity) and a Bachelor of Computer Science (Software Engineering and Cybersecurity), building applications with JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Python, and REST APIs. Delivered production-style systems including an AI-assisted resume tailoring platform and a full-stack incident management console, with a strong focus on system integrity, secure CI/CD pipelines, and dependency hygiene.

education.details: Major in Software Engineering and Cybersecurity

bullets.text: Designed and developed a full-stack AI-assisted resume tailoring platform that generates structured HTML and PDF outputs from job descriptions using Anthropic Claude and OpenAI APIs with dual-provider fallback logic.
Implemented strict no-fabrication validation logic and a structured JSON resume format with weighted bullet points and importance scores to enforce factual consistency across generated outputs.
Built a GitHub Actions CI/CD security pipeline with Bandit, Semgrep, Gitleaks, and pip-audit — scanning for vulnerabilities, secrets, and CVEs on every push to main.
Identified and resolved a medium severity Bandit finding (B104 interface binding vulnerability) surfaced by the pipeline, documenting the fix in the project README.
Deployed the application with VPN-only access (Tailscale) on a cloud VM to restrict public exposure and protect user data.
Developed a full-stack incident management console with a React/TypeScript frontend and FastAPI/Python backend, containerised with Docker and deployed via Render.
Implemented structured incident lifecycle tracking with severity classification, status transitions, ownership, SLA breach indicators, and root-cause analysis capture.
Built a full-stack GitHub Actions security pipeline covering Python (Bandit, pip-audit) and JavaScript (npm audit, Gitleaks) with a consolidated fail-gate enforcing zero HIGH findings before merge.

Discovered 8 CVEs in backend Python dependencies via pip-audit; replaced python-jose (no upstream fix path) with PyJWT and migrated the JWT authentication implementation to eliminate the vulnerability chain.
Resolved a high severity frontend vulnerability identified by npm audit by upgrading the Vite toolchain to v7 and associated plugin dependencies.
Built and launched a cybersecurity assessment platform aligned to the ACSC Essential Eight maturity model, deployed on Vercel with Supabase for data persistence.
Designed a 19-question structured assessment with automated scoring, category-level risk breakdowns, and CTI-backed findings.
Automated HTML report delivery using SendGrid transactional email and integrated Calendly booking to convert assessments into consultations.
Deployed a live marketing funnel with a landing page and LinkedIn launch assets to drive inbound leads.
Built a cross-platform mobile application using React Native and TypeScript with a focus on privacy-conscious data handling for sensitive health-related user interactions.
Implemented Firebase integration for authentication, cloud data storage, and messaging workflows.
Added geolocation and media upload capabilities with structured in-app navigation.
Contributed to front-end and back-end feature development for a dynamic web platform.
Implemented responsive UI components and API-driven features to enhance usability and data interaction.
Collaborated with stakeholders to translate functional requirements into maintainable code.
Implemented custom front-end features for an eCommerce website with focus on clean layout and responsiveness.
Supported server-side functionality for product displays, transactional workflows, and content updates.
Enhanced mobile usability and cross-device consistency across the platform.

certifications: AWS Academy Graduate – AWS Academy Cloud Foundations award
